# ArgisMonitor winget manifest (Gate 4, file-only).
#
# These files live at:  winget-pkgs/manifests/k/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor/3.8.44/
# in the `microsoft/winget-pkgs` repository (PR'd via winget-pkgs bot).
# Locally, the source-of-truth lives in `packaging/winget/` in this repo and is
# generated by `tools/build-winget.ps1` on each tagged release.

# === ArgisMonitor.installer.yaml ===
PackageIdentifier: KooshaPari.ArgisMonitor
PackageVersion: 3.8.44
PackageLocale: en-US
Publisher: KooshaPari / Phenotype.
PackageName: ArgisMonitor
License: MIT
ShortDescription: Unified AI router with 160+ providers (formerly OmniRoute)
Moniker: argismonitor
Tags:
- ai
- router
- openai
- mcp
- cli
- cross-platform
PublisherUrl: https://phenotype.space
PublisherSupportUrl: https://github.com/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor/issues
PrivacyUrl: https://argismonitor.phenotype.space/privacy
Author: KooshaPari
PackageUrl: https://argismonitor.phenotype.space
LicenseUrl: https://github.com/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor/blob/main/LICENSE
Copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 KooshaPari / Phenotype.
CopyrightUrl: https://github.com/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor
Description: |
  ArgisMonitor is a fork of diegosouzapw/OmniRoute, maintained as part of the
  Phenotype. initiative. It unifies 160+ AI providers behind one OpenAI-compatible
  API, with RTK+Caveman compression, auto fallback, MCP/A2A, desktop, and PWA.
ManifestType: singleton
ManifestVersion: 1.6.0
Installers:
- Architecture: x64
  InstallerType: zip
  InstallerUrl: https://github.com/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor/releases/download/v3.8.44/argismonitor-3.8.44.zip
  InstallerSha256: <computed at release time>
  InstallerSwitches:
    Custom: /SILENT
- Architecture: arm64
  InstallerType: zip
  InstallerUrl: https://github.com/KooshaPari/ArgisMonitor/releases/download/v3.8.44/argismonitor-3.8.44-arm64.zip
  InstallerSha256: <computed at release time>
  InstallerSwitches:
    Custom: /SILENT
DefaultLocale: en-US

# === ArgisMonitor.locale.en-US.yaml ===
PackageIdentifier: KooshaPari.ArgisMonitor
PackageVersion: 3.8.44
PackageLocale: en-US
Publisher: KooshaPari / Phenotype.

Moniker: argismonitor
Tags:
- ai
- router
- openai
- mcp
- cli
- cross-platform
ManifestType: locale
ManifestVersion: 1.6.0

# === ArgisMonitor.installer.yaml (deprecated alias) ===
# ArgisMonitor also publishes a "KooshaPari.OmniRoute" alias entry pointing at the
# same installer, with deprecation notes. This is removed once the legacy window
# closes (Gate 7).
